name: whatsapp-messaging-service
description: A WhatsApp-style messaging service with phone registration, 2FA, real-time messaging, and end-to-end encryption.

features.description: User registration via phone number with SMS verification code
Two-factor authentication with TOTP and SMS fallback
Biometric authentication support (fingerprint, face) via WebAuthn
JWT-based session management with refresh tokens and device tracking
Application lock with PIN or biometric after inactivity
FIDO2/WebAuthn passkey support for passwordless login
WebSocket-based real-time message delivery with read receipts
Group chat creation, management, admin roles, and participant limits
Image, video, audio, and document sharing with thumbnails
End-to-end encryption using Signal Protocol (double ratchet)
User profiles with avatar, status text, and online/last-seen
Push notifications via FCM/APNs for offline users
